## Checklist

- [ ] I ran the gate (`pnpm install`, `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm lint`, `pnpm test`, `pnpm test:e2e:smoke`, `pnpm build`).
- [ ] I added a changeset with `pnpm changeset` if package contents or consumer behavior changed.
- [ ] I updated docs when behavior, commands, or public APIs changed.
